creator: hyun@caffeinated.codes
text:
Created attachment 197651
Text dump

Installed sysutils/devcpu-data via, then added following lines per the post installation message:

# cat >> /boot/loader.conf
cpu_microcode_load="YES"
cpu_microcode_name="/boot/firmware/intel-ucode.bin"
^D
# shutdown -r now

Then, kernel panics immediately after loader.


The /etc/rc.conf way updates microcode without any problem.
